evidence.note: IBM Cloud defines throughput, latency, and error rates as key performance indicators for pipelines.
Microsoft Azure Data Factory monitors throughput, latency, and error rates for pipeline performance.
Wikipedia defines latency as the time delay between the cause and effect of a system.
AWS Pipeline defines latency as the time taken for data to pass through the pipeline.
Guru99 explains that a bottleneck in one stage can affect the overall throughput of a system.
BMC discusses how bottlenecks in pipelines can impact overall performance.
IBM lists data corruption, network failures, and software bugs as common error types in pipelines.
Microsoft Azure Data Factory discusses troubleshooting common errors, including data corruption and network failures.
